title: Gothofreda linearis

The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Bioactive constituents of Gothofreda linearis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Gothofreda linearis is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory conditions and to promote overall well-being.
